summary: Central estimate ~$18.2B, 80% CI $17.45-$18.90B for Alphabet Q4 2025 APAC constant-currency revenue
content:
Model built using two approaches:
1. YoY: Q4 2024 CC base ~$15.4B × (1 + 18% growth) = ~$18.2B
2. Sequential: Q3 2025 CC $17.691B × (1 + 2.6% Q/Q) = ~$18.15B

Key assumptions:
- Q4 2024 APAC headline derived from 2024 annual ($56.82B) minus Q1-Q3 → ~$15.0B headline
- FX headwind in Q4 2024 of ~3% → CC ~$15.4-15.5B
- YoY growth of 17-19% (slightly below Q3 2025's 19.28% due to base effects)
- Q3→Q4 seasonal uplift of 2-3%

Percentiles: P10=$17.45B, P50=$18.17B, P90=$18.90B
